title: Babylonian Talmud, Eruvin 13b: Hillel and Shammai

translation.text: For three years there was a dispute between the school of Shammai and the school of Hillel. The former said: 'The halacha is in agreement with our views.' A heavenly voice declared: 'Both these and those are the words of the living God, but the halacha is in agreement with the school of Hillel.'
